audit_trace: Decision Engine: Compliance evaluation indicates the employee with clearance level_1 is not authorized to initiate a $2000 financial transaction, violating ISO_27001 access control and privileged access controls. Despite no policy conflict and only a medium risk score, the lack of authorization mandates an automatic block.
